chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – Selling of the weapons among them (Ruling authorites)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/71)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/71)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ إِنِّي أَبِيعُ السِّلَاحَ قَالَ لَا تَبِعْهُ فِي فِتْنَةٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, form Abu Abdullah Al barqy, from Al Sarrad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I sell the weapons’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You cannot sell during the tribulations (trouble times)’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from abu ‘Abd Allah al-Barqiy from al-Sarrad who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that I sell arms. He (the Imam) said, ‘You must not sell them in times of mischief.’”
